## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix

## Checklist

- [ ] `bundle exec rake spec` passes
- [ ] `bundle exec rubocop` passes
- [ ] Frontend changes: `npm test`, `npm run lint`, `npm run build` pass
- [ ] New behavior is covered by tests
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
